subject: IBAS GRB Alerts 1978-1980
body:
D. Gotz (IASF-Mi) on behalf of the IBAS Localization Team reports:

IBAS Alerts 1978-80 on September 12 were not due to a real GRB, but to an
outburst of 4U 0115+63. This message is issued late due to the GCN
Circulars technical interruption of the last days.

This message can be cited.
